name: Alcohol Dependence
description: One drink became two, two became too many, and before long you were only able to find solace at the bottom of a goblet or flagon.  Gods be damned, you need a drink.

name: Simple Cooking
description: You've been living on your own long enough that you know how to cook basic dishes and feed yourself.

name: Social Skills
description: You've spent a significant portion of your life living among other people and are familiar with social norms.  You know how to talk with other people, and how to convey your emotions and understand those of others.

name: Mundane Survival
description: You've managed to survive life around a civilized settlement.  Through your ordeals you've learned how to treat scrapes and bruises, and how to keep your possessions and living space in reasonable condition.
